mapper.sql: FROM TBL_BOARD B JOIN TBL_USER U ON U.USER_ID = B.USER_ID WHERE B.IS_ACTIVE = 'Y'
mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS RN, X.* FROM ( SELECT B.BOARD_ID AS id, B.TITLE AS title, NVL(U.NICKNAME, U.USERID) AS writer,
TO_CHAR(B.REG_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS date,
NVL(B.VIEW_COUNT, 0) AS views, NVL(B.LIKE_COUNT, 0) AS likes, NVL(B.REPLY_CNT, 0) AS comments,
B.BOARD_TYPE AS boardType, B.TRADE_STATUS AS tradeStatus, B.PRICE AS price,
( SELECT MIN(F.SAVED_NAME) FROM TBL_BOARD_FILE F WHERE F.BOARD_ID = B.BOARD_ID AND F.IS_THUMBNAIL = 'Y' AND F.IS_ACTIVE = 'Y' ) AS thumbSavedName,
B.CONTENT AS content
AND B.BOARD_TYPE IN
#{t}
AND ( UPPER(B.TITLE) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{q}) || '%' OR UPPER(B.CONTENT) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{q}) || '%' )
ORDER BY B.REG_DATE DESC ) X WHERE ROWNUM <= #{endRow} ) WHERE RN >= #{startRow}

SELECT COUNT(*)
AND B.BOARD_TYPE IN
#{t}
AND ( UPPER(B.TITLE) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{q}) || '%' OR UPPER(B.CONTENT) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{q}) || '%' )
